title: Webhook not receiving requests due to inactive workflow
symptom: Requests sent to the webhook URL result in no executions or errors, indicating the webhook is not active.
not_this_if: Using the correct production webhook URL
root_cause: In n8n, webhooks only listen for incoming requests when the associated workflow is activated. If the workflow is saved but not activated, it will not process any incoming requests.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the production webhook URL
Check the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable if self-hosting
Verify that your reverse proxy is configured correctly
Ensure there are no firewall restrictions
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow and verify the webhook URL settings.
